message:
fix: SQL-standard null for empty aggregates; deduplicate aggregate code (-191 lines)

Correctness:
- partial-agg resolveValue: return null (not 0) for empty sum/avg/min/max/stddev/variance/median/percentile (SQL standard)
- Test updated: empty aggregate returns 1 row with null (SQL standard behavior)

Code reduction:
- sql/executor.ts: replace 100-line aggregate()/computeAgg() with 3-line delegation to partial-agg
- client.ts MaterializedExecutor: replace 70-line inline aggregation with 3-line delegation to partial-agg
- operators.ts ExternalSortOperator: store siftDown closure in initMerge, reuse in next() (-15 lines)
